summary: Tested monetization and membership features including subscription scheduler, admin pages, Wallet Top Up/Membership sections, and StripeOnboardingPrompt. All features working as expected.

minor.issue: Route conflict - caught by /listing/{listing_id} treating 'my' as a listing ID. Returns 404 instead of 401

action_items: Optional: Fix route conflict in marketplace_routes.py - /listings/my should be defined before /listing/{listing_id} to take precedence
critical_code_review_comments: Subscription scheduler properly configured with APScheduler - runs daily at 3AM UTC for renewals and every 6 hours for retries
StripeOnboardingPrompt correctly integrated in AIListingCreator.jsx using useStripeOnboarding hook with checkAndPrompt before publish
Wallet page has both Top Up BL Coins section (data-testid='topup-coins-section') and Membership Subscriptions section (data-testid='membership-section') permanently visible
Admin pages (membership-tiers, promo-codes, transactions) properly protected with admin authentication
context_for_next_testing_agent: All monetization features working correctly. Subscription scheduler running with 2 jobs (subscription_renewals at 3AM UTC, payment_retries every 6hrs). Wallet page shows Top Up BL Coins (4 packages: Starter 30k/$4.99, Value 80k/$9.99, Pro 400k/$14.99, Premium 1M/$29.99) and Membership Subscriptions (Bronze $4.99, Silver $9.99, Gold $14.99, Diamond $29.99). Admin pages require OTP authentication.

stripe_onboarding_prompt.status: INTEGRATED - shows when user tries to publish without Stripe connected
